purpose: Map OSINT capabilities to existing MCPs or plugin tools when they are available, so this plugin can delegate instead of reimplementing broad integrations.

built_in_or_common.use_for: Manual providers, login-required sites, visual checks, screenshots, and workflow verification.
GitHub-hosted tools, issue/PR context, source repositories, and upstream toolkit inspection.
Evidence matrices, source trackers, entity tables, and graph edge review.
Sanctions PDFs, court filings, reports, and official document extraction.

external_mcp_candidates.use_for: Large evidence ledgers, entity tables, and repeatable SQL analysis.
Persistent entity relationship graphs and network analysis.
Search-result capture, page rendering, login/session workflows, and screenshots.
Media, screenshots, archives, and large investigation artifact storage.

rule: Prefer a purpose-built existing MCP for durable data stores, browser automation, document parsing, or cloud storage. Keep this plugin focused on OSINT workflow orchestration, evidence normalization, provider routing, and investigation reasoning.
